name: two rush yards from plays columns diverge in yds_gained filter
description: Regression for measure-batch group_key bug: two instances of the same play-stat column-def with different per-column filter params (yds_gained) must emit distinct rate_aggregate CTEs. Previously both columns batched into one CTE and the second column silently inherited the first's filter.
expected_query: with "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2024.nfl_team) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2024" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_83a94558a51c" as materialized (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, SUM(rush_yds) AS m_7649c6e2e152 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."yds_gained" between 15 and 99 group by nfl_plays.bc_pid), "rate_aggregate_577ad02ec5d8" as materialized (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, SUM(rush_yds) AS m_7649c6e2e152 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.bc_pid) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_83a94558a51c.m_7649c6e2e152) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rush_yds_from_plays_0, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_577ad02ec5d8.m_7649c6e2e152) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rush_yds_from_plays_1, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2" on "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_83a94558a51c" on "rate_aggregate_83a94558a51c"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_577ad02ec5d8" on "rate_aggregate_577ad02ec5d8"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.primary_position IN ('RB') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 10
